Title: Requires the office of children and family services certify certain detention facilities for youths
Summary: Requires the office of children and family services certify certain detention facilities for youths and promulgate regulations for certain detention facilities for youths.
LawCode: Amd §§301.2, 304.1 & 320.5, Fam Ct Act; amd §510.15, CP L; amd §502, Exec L; amd §218-a, County L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the family court act, the criminal procedure law, the executive law and the county law, in relation to non-secure detention facilities for youth charged with acts of juvenile delinquency, juvenile offenses or adolescent offenses
